meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Scott Hurrey: Scaling Enterprise AI with MCP and A2A
meta.description:
Box has evolved enterprise AI integration from custom API code to standardized protocols that eliminate complexity at scale. This session by Scott Hurrey, Director of Developer Relations at Box, demonstrated how Box's Model Context Protocol (MCP) simplifies AI-to-tool connections and how the Agent-to-Agent Protocol (A2A) enables modular, multi-agent systems through a live invoice processing demo. 

Attendees saw real code comparisons and learned architectural patterns for building scalable, maintainable AI applications on enterprise content.

Explore our course with Box on this topic: https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/build-ai-apps-with-mcp-server-working-with-box-files/

-----------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
